title: Clearer Slot Highlight
description: Makes the item slot highlight a little clearer.
body:
Tired of Java's slot highlight covering the item you're selecting? Now it's behind the item instead. You're welcome.

![Pack Off vs Pack On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc893033294c3bb459d27f5beb9bbdf47394eb64.png)
